Home / Service Areas / Bothell

Handyman service in Bothell, WA

Trusted local professionals serving Bothell and surrounding communities

Serving Bothell, WA

Seattle Upgrade Construction LLC is excited to provide handyman services in Bothell, Washington. Characterized by its 1980s and 1990s suburban developments, Bothell offers a variety of homes that benefit from our expertise in maintenance, repair, and upgrades. We cater to the needs of Bothell residents with reliable and efficient service. Our services include everything from drywall patching and painting to kitchen and bathroom updates. We understand the common maintenance needs of homes built during this era, such as plumbing repairs and electrical upgrades. Seattle Upgrade Construction LLC is committed to providing top-quality work and excellent customer service to the Bothell community. We also offer weatherproofing services to protect your home from the Pacific Northwest climate.

Bothell's primarily suburban landscape means many homeowners are looking for reliable handyman services to maintain and upgrade their existing homes.
